reviews.comment:
El motel es ideal para pasar la noche ,nos alojamos ida y vuelta de Bs.As al sur ,se desayuna y se cena bien enfrente en el restaurant perteciente también al ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The motel is ideal for spending the night; we stayed there on our way to and from Buenos Aires to the south. Breakfast and dinner are good across the street at the restaurant, which also belongs to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada sobre la ruta, lo cual en un viaje largo ayuda a no perder tiempo buscando una estación de servicio. La atención es muy buena, teniendo en cuenta que ACA tiene muy poco personal para ello. He observado, especialmente en este verano 2020, que en todas las estaciones ACA que visité en el sur contaban con un solo empleado. Pese a la gran cantidad de clientes en plena temporada de turismo, los empleados con la mejor buena voluntad se esmeraban por atender rápido y cordialmente. Las 4 estrellas son un reconocimiento para ellos.

(Translated by Google)
It's located right on the highway, which is a big help on long trips, saving you time looking for a gas station. The service is very good, especially considering ACA has very limited staff. I noticed, particularly this past summer of 2020, that all the ACA stations I visited in the south had only one employee. Despite the large number of customers during peak tourist season, the employees, with the best of intentions, went out of their way to provide fast and courteous service. The 4 stars are a testament to their dedication.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOFl5VmV3EAE
